lessons.title: Count to 3
lessons.description: Help the castle pages put numbers 1 to 3 in the right order by spotting what comes first, next, and last.
objectives: Use first, next, and last words

lessons.title: Before and After to 5
lessons.description: Find which small number comes before or after as castle doors open to show number paths from 1 to 5.
objectives: Identify the number before another number
Identify the number after another number

lessons.title: Build a Number Line to 5
lessons.description: Arrange mixed-up number tiles to complete a simple castle number line from 1 to 5.
objectives: Spot missing numbers in a short sequence
Check number order from left to right

lessons.title: Count to 8
lessons.description: Put numbers 1 to 8 in order to help the royal cook stack treasure cakes in the correct sequence.
objectives: Find the next number in counting order

lessons.title: Missing Middle Numbers
lessons.description: Fill in numbers missing from the middle of castle paths and banners using counting order to 10.
objectives: Find missing numbers in a sequence
Use number patterns to complete rows

lessons.title: Race to 10
lessons.description: Choose and place numbers quickly to complete number tracks from 1 to 10 before the dragon reaches the tower.
objectives: Identify what comes before, after, and between

lessons.title: Count Back and Forth
lessons.description: Master number order by arranging numbers forward and backward on castle stairways up to 12.

lessons.title: Skip the Gap
lessons.description: Solve trickier number lines with several missing spaces and mixed choices as you repair the castle bridge.
objectives: Use sequence clues to test choices

lessons.title: Royal Number Challenge
lessons.description: Complete the grand castle challenge by sorting mixed numbers, fixing broken number lines, and choosing correct positions up to 20.
objectives: Identify numbers before, after, and between

lessons.title: Count the Daisies
lessons.description: Children count small groups of daisies in the meadow and choose the matching number.

lessons.title: Ladybug Spot Counting
lessons.description: Learners count ladybugs on leaves and build confidence counting objects up to 5.
objectives: Identify how many items are in a group

lessons.title: Butterflies in the Grass
lessons.description: Players count butterflies resting in the meadow grass and select the correct total.

lessons.title: Count the Mushrooms
lessons.description: Children count groups of mushrooms around the meadow, including mixed arrangements up to 8.
objectives: Count objects arranged in lines and clusters

lessons.title: Busy Bees to Count
lessons.description: Learners count buzzing bees near flowers in different layouts and choose the correct number.
objectives: Recognize that arrangement does not change quantity

lessons.title: Pebbles by the Stream
lessons.description: Players count pebbles beside a meadow stream, working with larger groups up to 10.

lessons.title: Fireflies at Dusk
lessons.description: Children count glowing fireflies in scattered groups across the evening meadow up to 12.
objectives: Check counts by recounting when needed

lessons.title: Acorns Under the Oak
lessons.description: Learners count acorns hidden among grass and roots, using careful visual scanning up to 15.
objectives: Use systematic scanning to count hidden items
Maintain one-to-one correspondence with larger groups

lessons.title: Meadow Mix Counting Challenge
lessons.description: Players count mixed meadow objects like flowers, snails, and stones in larger sets up to 20.
objectives: Apply counting strategies to complex scenes

lessons.title: Meet Even and Odd
lessons.description: Children sort small numbers into the Even room or the Odd room by looking at pairs and leftovers.
objectives: Recognize even and odd numbers to 10
Use pairing to decide if a number is even or odd

lessons.title: Find the Right House
lessons.description: Players help numbers 1 to 12 reach the correct house by checking whether each number can be split into pairs.
objectives: Identify even and odd numbers to 12

lessons.title: Even-Odd Number Line
lessons.description: Children use a number line to spot the pattern of even and odd numbers and choose the correct label.
objectives: Identify even and odd numbers to 20

lessons.title: Count and Check
lessons.description: Students count groups of objects and decide whether the total belongs in the Even room or the Odd room.
objectives: Determine if a counted total is even or odd

lessons.title: Finish the Pattern
lessons.description: Players complete number patterns by using the repeating even-odd rule and selecting the missing number type.
objectives: Use parity patterns to predict missing numbers
Classify numbers to 20 as even or odd

lessons.title: Compare the Numbers
lessons.description: Children look at two numbers and decide whether both are even, both are odd, or one of each.
objectives: Strengthen recognition of even and odd numbers to 30

lessons.title: Find the Odd One Out
lessons.description: Players examine groups of numbers and pick the one that does not match the others by evenness or oddness.
objectives: Identify a number with different parity in a set
Explain why numbers belong to even or odd groups

lessons.title: Parity Challenge
lessons.description: Students solve mixed even-odd questions with larger numbers, quick choices, and pattern clues around the house.
objectives: Classify numbers to 50 as even or odd
Use last-digit clues to determine parity
Apply parity rules in mixed tasks

lessons.title: Master of Even-Odd House
lessons.description: Children complete a final challenge by sorting, comparing, and spotting parity patterns across many numbers.
objectives: Demonstrate mastery of even and odd numbers
Sort, compare, and pattern numbers by parity

lessons.title: Count Fruit in Bowls
lessons.description: Children add and take small groups of fruit in kitchen bowls to find how many are left.
objectives: Take away 1 from a small group

lessons.title: Cookies on the Tray
lessons.description: Players help place and remove cookies from a baking tray while solving simple add and take problems.
objectives: Model taking away with kitchen items

lessons.title: Spoons and Cups
lessons.description: Children practice combining and removing spoons and cups to build early number sense in the kitchen.

lessons.title: Make a Sandwich
lessons.description: Players add and remove sandwich ingredients to solve kitchen math stories with totals up to 10.

lessons.title: Juice Cartons and Straws
lessons.description: Children track how many straws are added to or taken from lunch drinks using visual math scenes.

lessons.title: Pizza Slice Party
lessons.description: Players serve and remove pizza slices for hungry guests and solve addition and subtraction problems within 12.

lessons.title: Recipe Mixing Math
lessons.description: Children adjust ingredients in bowls by adding and taking amounts to complete trickier kitchen recipes.
objectives: Choose the correct operation from a story

lessons.title: Bakery Box Challenge
lessons.description: Players pack and unpack pastries in bakery boxes while solving multi-step add and take situations.

lessons.title: Chef Final Feast
lessons.description: Children help the chef manage plates, treats, and ingredients in the busiest kitchen challenge of the world.

lessons.title: Count the Flowers
lessons.description: Children hear a number from 1 to 3 and tap the matching group of flowers in the garden.
objectives: Match a spoken number to a quantity

lessons.title: Find the Butterflies
lessons.description: Players listen for numbers 1 to 5 and tap the group with the correct number of butterflies.

lessons.title: Tap the Ladybugs
lessons.description: Learners hear a target number and tap the patch showing that many ladybugs, building early counting confidence.

lessons.title: Seed Packet Match
lessons.description: Children hear numbers from 1 to 8 and tap the seed packet showing the matching amount of seeds.
objectives: Choose the correct quantity from several options

lessons.title: Pond Pebble Count
lessons.description: Players listen to a number and tap the group of pebbles that matches, with closer answer choices to increase challenge.

lessons.title: Garden Basket Numbers
lessons.description: Students hear numbers from 3 to 10 and tap the basket holding the matching number of fruits or vegetables.
objectives: Recognize and count numbers up to 10
Match spoken numbers to visual sets

lessons.title: Busy Bee Groups
lessons.description: Children hear a number from 5 to 12 and tap the flower patch with that many bees, using more crowded scenes.

lessons.title: Rows in the Garden
lessons.description: Players hear a target number and tap the garden row with the correct number of plants, even when rows look similar.
objectives: Translate spoken numbers into correct choices

lessons.title: Harvest Count Challenge
lessons.description: Learners hear numbers from 1 to 12 and tap the matching harvest group, mixing different garden items for the biggest challenge.
objectives: Count and recognize numbers up to 12
Match number words to mixed sets
Apply listening and counting skills fluently

lessons.title: Count in Order to 3
lessons.description: Children place numbers 1 to 3 in the correct order through simple sequencing play.
objectives: Put numbers in order from smallest to largest

lessons.title: Before and After to 5
lessons.description: Players practice finding which number comes before or after in short number lines up to 5.
objectives: Identify the next number in a sequence
Identify the previous number in a sequence

lessons.title: Put 1 to 5 in Order
lessons.description: Children sort mixed-up numbers from 1 to 5 into the correct counting order.
objectives: Compare which number is smaller or larger

lessons.title: Number Order to 10
lessons.description: Learners arrange numbers up to 10 and complete simple missing-number sequences.
objectives: Fill in one missing number in a sequence

lessons.title: Find Missing Numbers to 10
lessons.description: Players solve number-order puzzles by choosing the missing number in sequences within 10.
objectives: Use counting on to find missing numbers

lessons.title: Forward and Back to 15
lessons.description: Children practice ordering numbers forward and backward with sequences that go up to 15.
objectives: Order numbers from least to greatest

lessons.title: Number Sequences to 20
lessons.description: Learners tackle longer mixed sequences and place numbers correctly from 1 to 20.

lessons.title: Fill the Gaps in Number Order
lessons.description: Players complete trickier sequences with multiple missing numbers and mixed positions up to 20.
objectives: Use number order to solve gaps

lessons.title: Number Order Challenge to 30
lessons.description: Children solve advanced ordering puzzles with larger numbers, mixed arrangements, and longer sequences up to 30.
objectives: Apply counting strategies to complex sequences

lessons.title: Trace Numbers 1 to 3
lessons.description: Young learners trace and write the numbers 1, 2, and 3 with guided strokes and simple repetition.

lessons.title: Write Numbers 4 and 5
lessons.description: Children practice tracing and writing the numbers 4 and 5, building control and confidence with each stroke.

lessons.title: Mix and Write 1 to 5
lessons.description: Learners review numbers 1 through 5 by tracing and writing them in mixed order.
objectives: Write numbers 1 to 5 in mixed order

lessons.title: Write Numbers 6 to 8
lessons.description: Children learn the shapes of 6, 7, and 8 through guided number-writing practice.

lessons.title: Write Number 9 and 10
lessons.description: Students practice writing 9 and 10, including forming a two-digit number with correct spacing.

lessons.title: Review Write 1 to 10
lessons.description: A full review lesson where learners write numbers 1 through 10 in a shuffled sequence.

lessons.title: Fast Number Writing 1 to 10
lessons.description: Players write numbers 1 to 10 with less tracing support, building fluency and accuracy.

lessons.title: Missing Number Writing
lessons.description: Children identify a missing number in a short sequence and write it correctly.

lessons.title: Write and Match 1 to 10
lessons.description: In this challenge, learners write numbers 1 to 10 after seeing them briefly, practicing memory and formation.
